_comment: Brent crude daily price in GBP. brent_gbp = brent_usd / gbp_usd_spot. USD source: EIA Europe Brent Spot Price FOB (RBRTE daily); FX source: BoE 4pm spot fix (XUDLUSS).

methodology.indicator: Brent crude (Europe Brent Spot Price FOB, EIA series RBRTE) close, in GBP/bbl
methodology.release_cadence: daily (UK + US trading days; both markets must have a print)
methodology.extraction_notes: USD: EIA RBRTEd.xls (Europe Brent Spot Price FOB, $/bbl) -- US federal public-domain. FX: Bank of England Database series XUDLUSS (US$/GB pound, daily 4pm spot). Range 2024-07-04..2026-04-25 returned 9874 EIA Brent obs and 458 BoE FX obs in window; emitted 454 rows where BOTH series had a print. 4 days dropped (2026-04-21..2026-04-24) because EIA's RBRTEd table had not yet published those prints at extraction time. USD values rounded to 2dp; FX rounded to 4dp (BoE published precision); GBP/bbl computed as brent_usd / gbp_usd then rounded to 2dp. Definition consistency: USD figure is the EIA *spot* price (not a futures front-month settle); FX is the BoE 4pm spot fix. Same-day, same-definition pair.
